Elephant Charge 2008

9 November 2008 · 📍 Mitaba River

9 Entries
7 Completed
78% Finish rate
$2,000 Raised
9 Checkpoints
3× Gauntlet mult.
Results Checkpoints Awards Grants 🗺 Map

Net distance = competition distance minus penalties. Shorter net distance = better result. Gauntlet checkpoints carry a ×3 distance penalty.

Spirit of the Charge

Elephant Charge — Spirit of the Charge Trophy was awarded by the Kenya Rhino Charge to the Zambian Elephant Charge in recognition of Zambia having embraced the true spirit behind charging.

Elephant Charge results archive — data updated annually after each event.
elephantcharge.org
